figures.caption: Figure 2. Overview of F3G-Avatar. (a) MHR clothed body template. (b) Global Canonical Deformation (Body): front/back body positional maps are processed by the BodyUNet to predict pose-dependent body Gaussians. (c) Face-focused Deformation: head positional maps drive three StyleUNets to predict positional, color, and auxiliary face attributes. (d) Region-aware Reconstruction : The two branches are fused, posed via LBS, rendered with 3DGS, and optimized with reconstruction losses and a face-specific adversarial loss.
Figure 3. Visualization of the canonical face model construction from the MHR template and head positional maps.
Table 1. Quantitative comparison of full-body and face-focused novel-view synthesis on the AvatarReX [40] dataset.
Figure 4. F3G-Avatar displays state-of-the-art rendering quality by delivering improved facial details.
